"Makeup should disappear into the skin, then reappear in the photographs."
N° 01

The artist

Trained in editorial and bridal technique, working across Delhi NCR for weddings, shoots, and events.

Portrait
add your photo here

I started doing makeup for friends before exams and weddings — now it's a full practice.

My approach is simple: skin first, structure second, color last. I build every look around how it photographs and how it survives the day, not just how it looks in the mirror at 9am. Whether it's a bridal sangeet, a portfolio shoot, or a Saturday night out, I work with what your face already does well.

I bring my own kit — skin-safe, tested products, sanitised between every client — and I travel to your venue across Delhi NCR.

150+Brides & Clients
5+Years Practicing
NCRStudio & On-site
